attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
INCR.FID
,INCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
,INCR.APPLICATION_NAME              
,INCR.CURRENCY                      
,INCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID                    
,INCR.INSTANCE_NAME                 
,INCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             
,INCR.ITEM_NAME                     
,INCR.KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME              
,INCR.LEDGER_ID                     
,INCR.OA_ATTRIB_ID                  
,INCR.OA_PERCENTAGE                 
,INCR.RECORD_OFFSET                 
,INCR.OPERATING_UNIT                
,INCR.ORDER_LINE_ID                 
,INCR.ORG_ID                        
,INCR.QUANTITY                      
,INCR.SOURCE                        
,INCR.SUB_SKU_AMOUNT        
,INCR.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,INCR.EDW_CREATE_USER
,INCR.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,INCR.EDW_UPDATE_USER
,INCR.VALID_FLG
,CASE WHEN INCR.VALID_FLG = 'N' THEN 'INVALID_ATTR_PERC'  ELSE 'RI'  END AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CG_MERAKI_DIST_ALL_INCR_OA INCR
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL ON NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   = INCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AND NATL.SS_CODE = 'CG' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL ON NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = INCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AND NATIL.SS_CODE = 'CG' 
/*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP ON NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=INCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII ON NII.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = INCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=INCR.ITEM_NAME
/*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII ON  NII.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=INCR.ORDER_LINE_ID AND NSOL.SS_CODE='CG'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC ON(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = INCR.LEDGER_ID)
/*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST GLDIST ON GLDIST.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY  AND GLDIST.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG = 'N'*/
WHERE (INCR.VALID_FLG = 'N' 
    OR INCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IS NULL
    OR NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT IS NULL
	OR NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT IS NULL
    OR NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID IS NULL
	/*OR NII.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT IS NULL*/
	OR NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT IS NULL
	OR EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT IS NULL
	/*OR GLDIST.AR_TRX_KEY  IS NULL*/
	OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST GLDIST
WHERE GLDIST.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY 
AND GLDIST.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG = 'N')
	)

SELECT 
FID                           
,OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME        
,APPLICATION_NAME              
,TRX_CURR_CODE AS CURRENCY                      
,CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID                        
,INSTANCE_NAME                 
,OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             
,ITEM_NAME                     
,KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME              
,LEDGER_ID                     
,OA_ATTRIB_ID                  
,OA_PERCENTAGE                 
,RECORD_OFFSET                 
,OPERATING_UNIT                
,ORDER_LINE_ID                 
,ORG_ID                        
,OA_QUANTITY AS QUANTITY                      
,SOURCE                        
,SUB_SKU_AMOUNT    
,EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,EDW_CREATE_USER
,EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,EDW_UPDATE_USER
, 'Y' AS VALID_FLAG
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_MERK_OA 
WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES  
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_CG_MERAKI_DIST_ALL_RTBL_OA' AND TABLE_NAME='EL_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_MERK_OA')

SELECT 
FID                           
,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
,APPLICATION_NAME              
,CURRENCY                      
,CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID                       
,INSTANCE_NAME                 
,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             
,ITEM_NAME                     
,KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME              
,LEDGER_ID                     
,OA_ATTRIB_ID                  
,OA_PERCENTAGE                 
,RECORD_OFFSET                 
,OPERATING_UNIT                
,ORDER_LINE_ID                 
,ORG_ID                        
,QUANTITY                      
,SOURCE                        
,SUB_SKU_AMOUNT    
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
, 'Y' AS VALID_FLAG
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_MERK_OA

SELECT 
 NATL.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    
,NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY 
,NP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY
,NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE     
,CAST(GLDIST.GL_DATETIME AS DATE) AS GL_DT  
,COALESCE(GLDIST.GL_POSTED_DT, CAST( '3500-01-01' AS DATE) ) AS GL_POSTED_DT
,-995   AS CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY 
,-995   AS DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY 
,1 AS SEQUENCE_ID 
,'REVENUE_SHARE' AS ACCT_CLASS_CD 
,DIST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
,DIST.APPLICATION_NAME              
,DIST.CURRENCY                                         
,DIST.INSTANCE_NAME                 
,DIST.ITEM_NAME                                 
,DIST.LEDGER_ID                     
,DIST.OA_ATTRIB_ID AS OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT                 
,DIST.OA_PERCENTAGE                 
,DIST.RECORD_OFFSET                 
,DIST.OPERATING_UNIT                                 
,DIST.ORG_ID                        
,DIST.QUANTITY                      
,DIST.SOURCE                        
,CAST(DIST.SUB_SKU_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS SUB_SKU_AMOUNT    
,CAST(DIST.SUB_SKU_AMOUNT * (CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
     THEN 1.000000
     ELSE  CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(27,8))
        END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) SUB_SKU_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT   
,DIST.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,DIST.EDW_CREATE_USER
,DIST.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,DIST.EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CG_MERAKI_DIST_ALL_INCR_OA DIST
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = DIST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AND NATL.SS_CODE = 'CG' 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL 
ON NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = DIST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AND NATIL.SS_CODE = 'CG' 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB ON(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
/*INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP ON NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=DIST.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII ON  NII.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = DIST.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=DIST.ITEM_NAME
/*INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII ON  NII.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1*/
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=DIST.ORDER_LINE_ID AND NSOL.SS_CODE='CG'
INNER JOIN (SELECT GLDIST.AR_TRX_KEY,GLDIST.GL_POSTED_DT,MIN(GLDIST.GL_DATETIME) AS GL_DATETIME FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST GLDIST
WHERE GLDIST.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG = 'N' AND ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE='REC' GROUP BY 1,2) GLDIST ON GLDIST.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY   
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR  RFMTY ON  CAST(GLDIST.GL_DATETIME AS DATE) =  RFMTY.CALENDAR_DATE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_INV
  ON(NCCDR_INV.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = DIST.CURRENCY 
  AND NCCDR_INV.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
  AND NCCDR_INV.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= CAST(GLDIST.GL_DATETIME AS DATE)
  AND NCCDR_INV.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
WHERE DIST.VALID_FLG = 'Y' AND DIST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IS NOT NULL
